skills.name: Scope Mode / Air Walk
skills.skillDesc: Scope Mode: Sniper shot that pierces enemies. Body 150 damage, Headshot 300 damage. Air Walk: hover for mobility.

skills.name: Disassembly
skills.skillDesc: Combo-breaker attack that knocks back nearby enemies. 80 damage, does not scale with level. Can KO on lethal damage.
